classification.task_goal: Get exactly 61 chicken nuggets using only boxes of 7 and 10.
primary_constraints: Only buy boxes of 7 and 10 chicken nuggets.
Do not eat any chicken nuggets before having 61.
classification.reasoning: The assistant repeatedly violated the constraints by suggesting eating nuggets or returning boxes, which the user explicitly stated were not allowed. However, the user consistently corrected the assistant, reinforcing the constraints and ultimately guiding the conversation back to the original task of only using boxes of 7 and 10 without eating any nuggets.
